title: Northrop (NOC) Wins Contract to Support E-2D Hawkeye Aircraft
text: Northrop (NOC) is set to offer maintenance support equipment for the E-2D Hawkeye aircraft system.

title: Northrop (NOC) Wins $83M Contract to Support MQ-4C Triton UAS
text: Northrop (NOC) is set to provide retrofit of two MQ-4C Triton unmanned aircraft systems and one main operating base to an Integrated Functional Capability Four, multiple-intelligence configuration.

title: Northrop Grumman to Participate in the 11th Annual Morgan Stanley Laguna Conference
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., Aug. 30, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) will participate in the 11th Annual Morgan Stanley Laguna Conference on Wednesday, Sept. 13. Kathy Warden, chair, chief executive officer and president, and Dave Keffer, corporate vice president and chief financial officer, will present beginning at 11:10 a.m. Eastern time. The presentation will be webcast live at http://investor.northropgrumman.com .

title: Northrop (NOC) Wins Deal to Support Hawkeye Jet Production
text: Northrop's (NOC) business unit, Aeronautics Systems, secures a $29.1 million deal to support E-2D Advanced Hawkeye aircraft production.

title: Don't Sleep on These 3 Space Stocks That Will Mint Millionaires
text: The National Association for Business Economics (NABE) latest survey reveals that nearly seven in 10 economists have confidence in the Federal Reverse's ability to achieve a soft landing for the United States economy. There has been optimism among economists that the U.S. economy will recover in the foreseeable future.

title: Lockheed and Northrop win $1.5 billion worth of Pentagon contracts
text: Pentagon just awarded contracts worth $1.5 billion to Lockheed Martin Corp (NYSE: LMT) and Northrop Grumman Corp (NYSE: NOC). Shares of both companies are in the green at writing.

title: Pentagon space arm awards $1.5 billion contract to Lockheed Martin and Northrop Grumman for communications satellites
text: The Pentagon's Space Development Agency on Monday awarded $1.5 billion in contracts to Lockheed Martin and Northrop Grumman.

title: Northrop Grumman Selected to Build Tranche 2 Transport Layer-Beta Data Transport Satellites
text: WASHINGTON, Aug. 21, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) has been selected by the Space Development Agency (SDA) to design and build 36 data transport satellites, the first space vehicles in the latest generation of its low-Earth orbit Proliferated Warfighter Space Architecture (PWSA). The team will now update the company's Tranche 1 design to add new broadcast and tactical communications capabilities to PWSA.

title: The Space Tug Market Is Heating Up, and This Company Could Give Rocket Lab and Northrop Grumman a Run for Their Money
text: Firefly Aerospace is entering the space tug market with three new offerings: Elytra Dawn, Elytra Dusk, and Elytra Dark. There's just one problem: Northrop Grumman and Rocket Lab already have space tugs in orbit.

title: Northrop Grumman: 4 Reasons To Buy This Leading Defense Contractor
text: Northrop Grumman gets a buy rating today, agreeing with the consensus from analysts and Wall Street. Positives: capital strength, dividend yield vs. sector, valuation vs. sector, share price vs the 200-day average. Headwinds: earnings growth YoY needs improvement.

title: Northrop (NOC) Wins Contract to Aid SEWIP Block 3 Systems
text: Northrop (NOC) is set to provide design agent engineering of SEWIP Block 3 systems.

title: Air Force awards $235 million to JetZero to build prototype of sleek new plane
text: The U.S. Air Force will invest $235 million to help a startup manufacturer build a jet with a blended-wing body that officials say could provide greater range and efficiency for military tankers and cargo planes and perhaps eventually be used to carry airline passengers.

title: Northrop Grumman Board Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., Aug. 16, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The board of directors of Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) declared a quarterly dividend of $1.87 per share on Northrop Grumman common stock, payable Sept. 13, 2023, to shareholders of record as of the close of business Aug. 28, 2023.

title: RTX Secures U.S. Army Contract to Procure TOW 2B Missiles
text: RTX's TOW weapon system is currently deployed with more than 40 international armed forces and integrated on more than 15,000 ground, vehicle and helicopter platforms.

title: RTX's Unit Secures Contract for Satellite Communications Pod
text: RTX Corporation's (RTX) unit Collins Aerospace will provide a secure and reliable wireless data network to warfighters through its Beyond-Line-Of-Sight satellite communications pod.

title: Kitron: Northrop Grumman Awards Contracts to Kitron
text: (2023-08-10) Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) has awarded Kitron a sub-contract for production of AN/ASQ-242 Integrated Communications, Navigation, and Identification (CNI) modules for the F-35 Lightning II-program. Deliveries will secure a backlog into 2025 and have a total value of more than USD 13 million.

title: Northrop Grumman Completes First Next Generation Interceptor Solid Rocket Motor Booster Cases
text: Team remains on track for first static test fire of an NGI motor in 2023 Team remains on track for first static test fire of an NGI motor in 2023

title: Northrop Grumman Achieves Key Milestone in Arctic Satellite Broadband Mission
text: WASHINGTON, Aug. 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) has delivered two major components of the Arctic Satellite Broadband Mission (ASBM) and has started the next phase of pre-launch preparations. This two-satellite constellation will deliver protected satellite communications to the Northern polar region – one of the most difficult locations on earth to deliver communications.

title: Northrop Grumman's NG-19 Launch Marks 10 Years of International Space Station Cargo Resupply Missions
text: DULLES, Va., Aug. 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) has successfully launched its 19th resupply mission (NG-19) to the International Space Station (ISS) under NASA's Commercial Resupply Services-2 (CRS-2) contract aboard the company's Antares rocket. This launch commemorates ten years of Northrop Grumman Cygnus missions.

title: Aerospace & Defense ETFs Under Spotlight Amid Upbeat Q2 Results
text: Capitalize on the upbeat Q2 earnings of the Aerospace and Defense companies with these ETFs.
